summary: PR 2483 decompiled and refined additional lbcardnew memory-card routines, especially snapshot scanning and several functions that reached 100% match in the bot report. The diff added typed snapshot/card-entry names, a helper for repeated card-entry setup, updated lbcardnew/lbsnap interfaces and structs, and made smaller include/prototype/formatting changes across related lb, mn, and baselib files.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; adds CardEntry/SnapshotNode helper types, setup_card_entries, implementation work for lb_8001B14C, matched rewrites for lb_8001A594/lb_8001BA44/lb_8001BC18/lb_8001C4A8, and typed snapshot/free-space fields.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/lb/lbcardnew.c +153/-53
diff: lbcardnew.c hunks around lb_8001A594, lb_8001B14C, lb_8001BA44, lb_8001BC18, lb_8001BFD8, lb_8001C4A8
bot_report: 4 new matches and lb_8001B14C improvement in main/melee/lb/lbcardnew

key_files.role: Header signature update for lb_8001BFD8 to use lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry* and int* free-space outputs.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.h lb_8001BFD8 prototype changed from UNK_T snap args to typed snapshot/free_blocks/free_files args

key_files.role: Adds forward declaration for lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry used by lbcardnew.h.
evidence_refs: diff: forward.h adds typedef struct lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry

diff: lbsnap.c replaces unk0/unk8/unkC/unk10 uses with card_result/free_blocks/free_files/entries in visible hunks

diff: lbmthp.h adds blank line between includes

what_changed.text: Implemented lb_8001B14C beyond its prior stub, scanning card file numbers 0..0x7E with CARDGetStatus, filtering by current disk company/game and digit-starting filenames, converting filenames with strtoul, inserting SnapshotNode records sorted by descending time, copying them to lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry output entries, marking remaining file_no entries as -1, and freeing the temporary node buffer.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c removes 'Stubbing it out for now' comment and adds lb_8001B14C body
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001B14C uses CARDGetStatus, DVDGetCurrentDiskID, strncmp, isdigit, strtoul, HSD_MemAlloc, HSD_Free

what_changed.text: Matched four lbcardnew functions according to the bot report: lb_8001C4A8, lb_8001A594, lb_8001BA44, and lb_8001BC18 all reached 100%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists 4 new matches for main/melee/lb/lbcardnew

what_changed.text: Improved unmatched lb_8001B14C from 1.04% to 63.23% according to the bot report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists lb_8001B14C +761 bytes, 1.04% to 63.23%

what_changed.text: Introduced a local CardEntry struct with file_size, file_flags, and data_size fields and used it in card-entry setup paths instead of anonymous unk0/unk4/unk8 structs.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c adds struct CardEntry
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001ACEC/lb_8001AE38 use entries[i].data_size
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001C4A8 uses entry->file_size/file_flags/data_size

what_changed.text: Factored repeated hsd_803B2ADC plus hsd_803AC3E0 card-entry setup loop into setup_card_entries and reused it in lb_8001A594.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c adds inline setup_card_entries
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001A594 replaces duplicated entry loop with setup_card_entries

what_changed.text: Changed lb_8001BFD8 from generic UNK_T snapshot parameters to typed lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry* snapshot_entries, int* free_blocks, and int* free_files, and propagated corresponding field names into lb_80432A68 and lbsnap callers.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BFD8 signature and assignments changed
diff: lbcardnew.h lb_8001BFD8 prototype changed
diff: lbsnap.c lb_8001D40C calls lb_8001BFD8(chan, ptr->entries, &ptr->free_blocks, &ptr->free_files)

what_changed.text: Renamed visible lbsnap state fields from unk-style names to card_result, free_blocks, free_files, entries, time, file_no, and blocks.
evidence_refs: diff: lbsnap.c visible hunks replace ptr->unk0/unk8/unkC/unk10 with typed field names

what_changed.text: Expanded lb_8001BA44 and lb_8001BC18 from wrapper calls into explicit task setup sequences, with local stack padding arrays visible in the diff.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BA44 replaces lb_8001B99C call with lb_80019EF0/setup_task/lb_80019CB0 sequence
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BC18 replaces lb_8001BB48_inline call with explicit setup sequence

what_changed.text: Updated include/prototype surfaces for the new types, including adding <MSL/strtoul.h> and a forward declaration include in lbcardnew.h.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c adds #include <MSL/strtoul.h>
diff: lbcardnew.h adds #include <melee/lb/forward.h>
diff: forward.h adds lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry forward typedef

smart_moves.text: Recovered semantic field names only where usage evidence is visible: snapshot_entries/free_blocks/free_files are written by lb_8001BFD8 and consumed by lbsnap; CardEntry fields align with hsd_803AC3E0 arguments and data-size calls.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BFD8 assignments
diff: lbsnap.c lb_8001D3B0/lb_8001D3CC/lb_8001D3E8
diff: lbcardnew.c setup_card_entries and lb_8001ACEC/lb_8001AE38

smart_moves.text: Used a small helper to express a repeated sentinel-terminated card-entry loop, reducing duplicated generated-looking blocks while preserving the same sentinel and skip-zero behavior.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c setup_card_entries loops while entry->file_size != -1 and skips file_size == 0
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001A594 duplicated loop replaced by helper call

smart_moves.text: Kept an address-style function name for lb_8001B14C after removing the external-map comment, avoiding promotion of the UnclePunch name as canonical in this PR.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c removes comment 'UnclePunch map calls this "MemoryCard_ScanForSnapshots"'
diff: function remains named lb_8001B14C

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a repeated setup loop over file entries has a clear sentinel and argument mapping, a narrow helper plus a temporary local struct can improve source shape and support matching without requiring a full public type immediately.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c adds struct CardEntry and setup_card_entries
text_corpus: bot report says lb_8001A594 and lb_8001C4A8 reached 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: For snapshot scanning code, typed output buffers and free-space pointer names made cross-file intent clearer: lbcardnew fills snapshot entries and free counts, while lbsnap reads entries/time/file_no/blocks.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.h typed lb_8001BFD8 prototype
diff: lbsnap.c call and field-name replacements
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001B14C copies time/file_no/blocks into snapshot_entries

decomp_lessons.lesson: Inlining or expanding thin wrappers into the task setup sequence can be a matching tactic for lbcardnew routines, but the PR evidence only supports this for lb_8001BA44 and lb_8001BC18 where the bot reports new matches.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BA44 and lb_8001BC18 explicit setup_task sequences
text_corpus: bot report lists lb_8001BA44 and lb_8001BC18 as new 100% matches

naming_conventions.name: lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry
naming_conventions.convention: Subsystem-prefixed type name for a snapshot entry shared between lbcardnew and lbsnap.
evidence_refs: diff: forward.h adds lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry
diff: lbcardnew.h uses lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry* in lb_8001BFD8

naming_conventions.name: snapshot_entries/free_blocks/free_files
naming_conventions.convention: Use direct output-role names for snapshot scan result buffer and free-space outputs instead of unk_20/unk_24/unk_28 or generic snap_buf/snap_count/snap_max.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_80432A68 fields renamed in initialization and lb_8001BFD8 assignments
diff: lbcardnew.h lb_8001BFD8 prototype

naming_conventions.name: card_result/free_blocks/free_files/entries/time/file_no/blocks
naming_conventions.convention: Replace unk-style fields with observable role names when accessors and copy-out logic prove the role.
evidence_refs: diff: lbsnap.c visible field replacements
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001B14C writes time, file_no, and blocks

naming_conventions.name: file_size/file_flags/data_size
naming_conventions.convention: Name temporary recovered struct fields by their callsite roles in hsd_803AC3E0 and related card read/write calls.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c struct CardEntry
diff: lbcardnew.c hsd_803AC3E0(ctx, i, entry->file_size, entry->file_flags, entry->data_size)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Helper extraction for repeated card-entry setup loop.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c setup_card_entries
text_corpus: bot report shows lb_8001A594 reached 100%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No review comments explain whether helper extraction was required for matching versus readability; evidence is limited to diff and bot result.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit task setup code instead of calling existing wrappers in functions that newly matched.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BA44 expands prior lb_8001B99C wrapper call
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BC18 expands prior lb_8001BB48_inline call
text_corpus: bot report lists both functions as 100% after the PR
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Treat this as a local lbcardnew tactic, not a global rule to expand wrappers.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use local stack padding arrays and volatile locals in some lbcardnew functions where the diff preserves or adds them around matching work.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BA44 adds u8 _[0x10]
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BC18 adds u8 _[0x18]
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001ACEC/lb_8001AE38 keep volatile cached_* and pad_stack locals
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Loaded evidence does not include objdiff details beyond the bot match summary; do not generalize this as accepted style without narrow verification.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Sorted linked-list insertion in lb_8001B14C expresses ordering of snapshot records by time while keeping an allocated node array.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001B14C uses scan = &head and while (*scan != NULL && (*scan)->time > node->time)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This function remained only partially matched in the bot report, so this is useful evidence but not a fully validated match pattern.

notes: There are no review comments or reviews in the loaded evidence.
The diff is truncated, so exact hunks for lbsnap.static.h, types.h, mndatadel.c, mndatadel.static.h, and hsd_3AA7.* are not visible here.
The bot report provides match percentages and new matches, but no build log, objdiff detail, or reviewer rationale.
Some tactics such as stack padding, volatile locals, and explicit wrapper expansion are grounded in the diff but should not be promoted as global standards from this PR alone.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed temporary structs and helpers for repeated sentinel card-entry setup loops
accepted_candidate_records.text: In lbcardnew, a local CardEntry struct and setup_card_entries helper replaced repeated anonymous unk0/unk4/unk8 loops over sentinel-terminated file entries. The PR evidence ties this to matched lb_8001A594 and lb_8001C4A8, but the struct still appears local/temporary rather than a proven public type.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c adds struct CardEntry and setup_card_entries
text_corpus: bot report lists lb_8001A594 and lb_8001C4A8 as 100%

accepted_candidate_records.title: Propagate recovered snapshot output types through headers and callers
accepted_candidate_records.text: lb_8001BFD8 was changed from UNK_T snapshot arguments to lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry* plus int* free-space outputs, with matching field-name updates in lbcardnew and lbsnap. This is good evidence for typed interfaces replacing generic unknown parameters when producer and consumer roles are clear.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.h lb_8001BFD8 prototype
diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BFD8 assignments
diff: lbsnap.c lb_8001D40C call

source_update_candidates.title: lbcardnew.c owns memory-card snapshot scan implementation work
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2483 shows src/melee/lb/lbcardnew.c implementing lb_8001B14C snapshot scanning with CARDGetStatus, current DVD disk ID checks, strtoul filename time parsing, sorted temporary SnapshotNode records, and lbCardNew_SnapshotEntry copy-out.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001B14C body
text_corpus: bot report lb_8001B14C improved to 63.23%
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path fact for future lbcardnew snapshot work; should be curated because the function was not fully matched in this PR.

source_update_candidates.title: lbsnap consumes lbcardnew snapshot entries and free-space outputs
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2483 shows src/melee/lb/lbsnap.c calling lb_8001BFD8 with ptr->entries, &ptr->free_blocks, and &ptr->free_files, then reading entry file_no/time/blocks and card_result state.
evidence_refs: diff: lbsnap.c visible hunks around lbSnap_8001D3B0, lbSnap_8001D3CC, lbSnap_8001D3E8, lbSnap_8001D40C, lbSnap_8001D5FC
source_update_candidates.reason: Supports future cross-file searches for snapshot entry layout and state fields.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not promote wrapper expansion as a general style from this PR alone
source_update_candidates.text: lb_8001BA44 and lb_8001BC18 reached 100% after replacing wrapper calls with explicit task setup sequences, but the evidence is local to lbcardnew and lacks review rationale. If documented, frame as a narrow matching tactic requiring verifier evidence, not a general preference.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c lb_8001BA44 and lb_8001BC18
text_corpus: bot report lists both as new 100% matches
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate note aligns with existing standards on matching tactics needing evidence; curator should decide whether this adds anything new.

rejection_notes.text: Do not treat 'MemoryCard_ScanForSnapshots' as an accepted canonical function name from this PR; the diff removes a comment saying an external UnclePunch map calls lb_8001B14C by that name, while keeping the address-style symbol.
evidence_refs: diff: lbcardnew.c removes UnclePunch map comment and leaves lb_8001B14C name
